response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled full-stack and systems engineer with over 15 years of experience, but his background is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His C++ exposure is minimal — limited to a bachelor's thesis project and a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments — while his career has been built almost entirely on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. The role demands deep C++/STL expertise, industrial protocol knowledge (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT), and familiarity with IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards, none of which appear in his profile.
strengths: Demonstrated experience designing high-performance, high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic using async I/O and low-latency techniques)
Event-driven architecture experience through the GISCollective open-source geo-data platform built on Node.js
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and agile methodologies across multiple roles
concerns: C++ is not a working language — career is primarily TypeScript/Node.js/DLang with only marginal, dated C++ exposure
Zero industrial automation, IoT, or OT (operational technology) domain experience
No knowledge of IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle for industrial systems, or industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
